step_name: Phase 5: Bilingual Hardening & Production Stress Testing
features_added: PostgreSQL partial unique index for slot booking
Supabase RPC book_slot_atomic for atomic locks
Bilingual hardening for DB errors and invalid inputs
issues_found: In-memory processingLocks failed to prevent DB race conditions across Render instances.
Webhook silently ignored photos, blocking invalid-input fallback.
fixes_applied: Replaced saveAppointment insert with book_slot_atomic RPC and exception handling.
Modified index.js to pass [Media/Unsupported] to bot.js to trigger Arabic/English fallback.
